calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

The Court stated that Mr. Popper was going to see if he could obtain more information, that Mr. Popper has not filed anything, and that Mr. Popper is not present in court today. The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage was then taken under submission by the Court to determine if the matter should be taken off calendar due to Mr. Popper's failure to appear or if the matter could be resolved if the Court determines that it has enough information at this time.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: M. Nuque. Matter not reported.

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2019 Continued To Oct-23-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Popper in Propria Persona.

The Court explained that in order to grant this it needs to know that a marriage license was issued which is different from the document that the Officiant sends in. Mr. Popper stated that he did not look for a marriage license, but he went to City Hall three times and they sent him here. The Court stated that the petition tells it that they don't have the post marriage document, that Mr. Popper needs to go to the County Clerk and see if they have a record of a marriage license and explained that the license is what Mr. Popper would have been required to have shortly before the ceremony. The Court also informed Mr. Popper that if he is unable to obtain a record of a marriage license, he must file a declaration under oath and pursuant to the Laws of California explaining what he has attempted and what he was told. The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage is continued to October 23, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
